title: Job Description Decomposition and Evidence Mapping · Hiring Signal Forensics
summary: A realistic job description decomposition and evidence mapping artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in role requirement and evidence matrix and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording.
Classify stated requirements as essential evidence, likely preference, negotiable proxy, process constraint, or unresolved question.
Map each priority outcome to direct, adjacent, transferable, missing, or contradictory candidate evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Extraction
steps.instruction:
debug case — A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording.

Inspect the Outcome Extraction trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Extraction.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Extraction, keep Outcome Extraction connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Outcome Extraction, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Extraction, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Outcome Extraction precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Extraction, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Outcome Extraction, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Matching nouns matters more than understanding expected work.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Extract the problems, users, decisions, deliverables, collaboration, quality, and operating outcomes beneath requirement wording. Artifact under review: role requirement and evidence matrix.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Outcome Extraction.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Outcome Extraction, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
